title: 30o: download_blob forces Vec copy of Bytes body
description:
Location: crates/jmap-chat/src/blob.rs, download_blob(), line 160.

resp.bytes().await returns reqwest::Bytes, a reference-counted buffer with no copy. .to_vec() on line 160 copies the entire downloaded payload into a new heap Vec<u8>.

The function returns Vec<u8>, forcing this copy. For blob downloads (potentially megabytes), this doubles peak memory and adds an O(n) copy of the entire payload.

Fix: change the return type of download_blob to bytes::Bytes. Callers that need owned Vec<u8> can do .to_vec() themselves; callers that can use Bytes directly avoid the copy entirely.

Impact: O(n) extra allocation proportional to download size. For large blobs this is the dominant cost of the function.
close_reason: design decision: Vec<u8> is simpler API; O(n) copy is known tradeoff for blobs <1MB typical
